CHECKOUT
Checkout

Confirm buyer information, generate a quote, and place the order. AgentGuard authorizes protected checkout.

Trust check: Unsigned

Sign in before elevated buyer actions. Wallet KYC is optional advanced setup.

BUYER DETAILS
Billing information
Full name *
Email *
Phone *
GSTIN

Optional, used for business purchases and GST invoices.

DELIVERY
Delivery address
Street address *
City *
State *
Postal code *

Use a 6-digit PIN code so local quote generation can estimate delivery.

PAYMENT
Payment method
UPI
Card
Net banking
Wallet
Cash on delivery
Pay using any UPI app like GPay, PhonePe, or Paytm.
UPI ID

Enter a UPI handle like mobile@upi or username@oksbi.

CART PREVIEW
Current basket
Sharbati Atta 5kg × 1
INR 325.00
Robusta Bananas (12 pcs) × 2
INR 156.00
Subtotal
INR 481.00

Complete the form to estimate delivery, tax, and the final quote.

BUYER AUTHORITY
Shopping agent limits
Auto-approve checkout up to (INR)

Routine checkout up to INR 10000 can proceed without step-up. Higher carts need exact one-time approval; replay is rejected.

Payment, ONDC exchange, logistics, and settlement are simulated; AgentGuard authorization and receipt creation are real local gateway checks.
